templates.name: Premium Outdoor Editorial Showcase
templates.best_for: High-ticket outdoor living, landscape, pool, and design-build brands with real project photography and a taste-led sale.
templates.prompt_focus: Let authentic project images carry the page. Use restrained copy, editorial white space, and a clear design consultation path.

templates.name: Premium Outdoor Consultation Led
templates.best_for: Premium outdoor brands where the conversion is a design walkthrough, site walk, or consultation instead of a quick quote.
templates.prompt_focus: Make the buyer feel qualified into a design process. Emphasize calm scope, project fit, and expert guidance.

templates.name: State48 Authority Blue
templates.best_for: Authority-first homepages and service pages that need a premium look with an early estimate action.
templates.prompt_focus: Use this when the page needs premium trust, layered proof, and an early estimate form without feeling generic.

templates.name: State48 Estimator-Led
templates.best_for: Demo pages where the call-to-action needs to appear near the top and repeatedly through the funnel.
templates.prompt_focus: Prioritize fast conversion, estimate framing, and a visible proof stack.

templates.name: Keystone Earthy Restoration
templates.best_for: Restoration, roofing, remodeling, and trust-heavy home service brands that need warmth instead of tech energy.
templates.prompt_focus: Lean into grounded trust, craftsmanship, and a simple, reassuring conversion path.

templates.name: Keystone Contact Heavy
templates.best_for: Lead-gen pages that need direct contact conversion without a huge number of modules.
templates.prompt_focus: Use this for cleaner pages with trust, process, testimonials, and a strong contact close.

templates.name: Rockin Rugged Industrial
templates.best_for: Rougher blue-collar services that need confident industrial styling and strong visual attitude. Also proven for family-owned pest control with aggressive motif (Richardson Pest, April 2026 run).
templates.prompt_focus: Favor aggressive typography, rugged section rhythm, and bold CTA blocks. Dark-palette tolerance is high — easy amber/copper/green swap from red.

templates.name: Rockin Rugged — Family Home Service flavor
templates.best_for: Family-owned pest / extermination / home-service brands with a distinct motif (scorpion, shield, etc) and a founder-story hook. Use rockin-rugged as the scaffold + apply Richardson-flavor palette/typography/motif.
templates.prompt_focus: Inherit rockin-rugged's section rhythm + hard-shadow button discipline; swap red palette for logo-derived amber; replace industrial rigging motif with the client's committed motif (animal/shield/emblem).

templates.name: Rockin Gallery Social
templates.best_for: Brands with strong project photos, before/after content, or social proof that should shape the layout.
templates.prompt_focus: Use visuals and project proof as core page structure, not decoration.

templates.name: Rockin Service Area Map
templates.best_for: Businesses selling coverage, delivery range, or local service areas as a major trust factor.
templates.prompt_focus: Highlight territory, map support, and local reach in a bold way.

templates.name: Proactive Clean Cyan
templates.best_for: Modern residential service brands that need a clean, polished, upscale feel.
templates.prompt_focus: Favor clean spacing, polished service cards, and a premium residential vibe.

templates.name: Proactive Inspection Led
templates.best_for: Lead-gen pages where the offer is an inspection, quote, or evaluation rather than generic contact.
templates.prompt_focus: Make the inspection-style offer feel specific, low-friction, and premium.

templates.name: Proactive Local Service Area
templates.best_for: Local SEO demos that need a clear blend of service explanation and geographic trust.
templates.prompt_focus: Use this when local market coverage and contact trust need to be obvious.

templates.name: Doggy Bold Membership
templates.best_for: Consumer-facing services that need more personality, membership energy, or a lifestyle feel.
templates.prompt_focus: Use bold personality, playful confidence, and membership-style offer framing.

templates.name: Doggy Pricing Promo
templates.best_for: Pages that need visible pricing, offer framing, and consumer promo sections.
templates.prompt_focus: Make offers and plan choices visually central without losing design polish.
